outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to extreme negative gamma exposure across all expiries (-5.74B total). Dealers are short gamma, which will amplify price movements, particularly to the downside.
outlook.summary: Market structure is heavily short gamma (-5.74B Total GEX), indicating dealers will sell into weakness and buy into rallies, fueling volatility. Spot (635.28) is trapped between the massive structural support at 630 and the 0DTE Call Wall at 655. The 630 level is a critical 'line in the sand'; a break below triggers aggressive dealer selling. Max Pain at 645 suggests an upside magnet if support holds.

levels.motivazione: Massive Put Open Interest confluence (67k Weekly + 113k Monthly). Primary structural support. Dealers are long gamma here, but a break forces liquidation.
Dominant 0DTE Call OI (48k) acting as the primary intraday resistance. Negative gamma suggests dealers will sell into strength at this level.
0DTE Max Pain level. Acts as an attraction zone for price expiry. Located between current spot and Call Wall.
Significant Call Open Interest in Weekly and Monthly expiries. Confluence of resistance defining the upper bound of the range.
Secondary structural support with high Put OI in Weekly (59k) and Monthly (33k). Major downside target if 630 fails.
Current spot price coincides with high 0DTE Put Volume (343k). Indicates intense intraday hedging friction and potential pinning.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: HIGH VOLATILITY: Negative GEX regime (-1.51B total) indicates dealers are short gamma across all expiries. Price movements will be amplified in both directions. Expect rapid acceleration on breaks of key levels.
outlook.summary: Market operates in a short gamma regime with significant negative exposure. 0DTE shows bullish call dominance (PCR 0.45) while WEEKLY/MONTHLY display bearish put hedging (PCR 1.08-1.80). This divergence creates tension. Max Pain at 570 acts as magnetic target. RESONANCE support at 550 represents strongest structural level across all expiries.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Significant PUT OI across ALL 3 expiries (0DTE: 8,413, WEEKLY: 5,680, MONTHLY: 31,151). Total 45,244 PUT OI creates major structural support. Market makers defend this level aggressively.
Dominant 0DTE CALL OI (86,989) creates major resistance. Dealers short calls must sell underlying on rallies, amplifying selling pressure at this level.
ATM strike with massive 0DTE volume (173,004) vs OI (6,718). Volume/OI ratio >25 indicates intense intraday battle. High friction zone for directional moves.
0DTE Max Pain level (1.4% above spot) attracts price expiration. CONFLUENCE with MONTHLY PUT WALL (37,932 OI). Dual role as magnetic target and resistance.
CONFLUENCE: 0DTE PUT (6,367) + MONTHLY PUT (29,316). Immediate support below spot. Negative GEX amplifies importance of nearby support levels.
Secondary 0DTE CALL OI (78,973) provides immediate resistance. Combined with 585 CALL WALL creates overhead supply zone.
CONFLUENCE: Top 0DTE PUT OI (11,432) combined with MONTHLY PUT (16,798). Secondary structural support in negative gamma regime.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Mixed GEX profile: positive 0DTE gamma (+0.26B) provides short-term stability, but negative weekly/monthly gamma (-0.50B combined) suggests medium-term volatility amplification on directional breaks.
outlook.summary: Spot pinned between 23300 pivot and 23400 resistance. Bearish 0DTE skew (1.48 ratio) with heavy put positioning (PCR 3.03) contrasts positive gamma. Max Pain at 23790 provides upward magnetic pull. Range breakout likely with volatility expansion.

levels.motivazione: WEEKLY Put OI (474) concentrated at spot level creating immediate equilibrium. Dealers pinned at this strike with active delta hedging creating price friction.
0DTE Call Wall (206 OI, 734 VOL) with elevated volume ratio (3.6x). Immediate resistance with opposing WEEKLY Put OI (478) creating friction zone.
0DTE Put Wall (225 OI, 684 VOL) with 3.0x volume ratio. Key structural support zone with active dealer hedging in positive gamma environment.
Multi-expiry alignment: 0DTE (212 OI, 884 VOL) + MONTHLY (237 OI). Strong dealer defense zone with 4.2x volume ratio indicating heavy hedging activity.
0DTE Max Pain 2.1% above spot. Dealer target zone acting as upward magnet in positive gamma environment. Price attraction active.
Massive MONTHLY Put OI (1471, 1080 VOL) indicates institutional hedging above spot. Psychological level with dealer short gamma exposure creating volatility risk.
WEEKLY (471 OI) + MONTHLY (403 OI) Call Wall alignment. Major structural resistance coinciding with Monthly Max Pain. Ultimate upside target.
